steps.title: Analyze the equation
steps.content: Set each factor of $\left(48\right)(x^3+125)(x^4-16)=0$ to zero. From $x^3=-125$ we get $x=-5$; from $x^4=16$ we get $x=\pm 2$ (the other two roots are non-real).

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content: The distinct real solutions are $-5,\ 2,\ -2$ - exactly three. That matches the correct answer, so B is correct.
